checks.description: Core shell restores five supported locales.
Shared i18n exports locale loaders for en/es/fr/pt/ur.
Spanish core shell translation resolves action-rail aria-label.
French core shell translation resolves settings title.
Portuguese core shell translation resolves status runtime browser.
Urdu core shell translation resolves status runtime browser.
Client i18n service persists locale using a dedicated storage key.
Client i18n service writes locale to localStorage on setLocale.
Runtime provider registers shared core locale loaders and restores persisted locale from settings store.
Language settings panel is registered in core settings surfaces.
Project selector exposes a visible language selector entry.
Header strings are catalog-driven through useClientI18n.
Footer/status strings are catalog-driven through useClientI18n.
Settings modal surfaces catalog-driven strings.
Data settings strings are catalog-driven.
Git settings strings are catalog-driven.
OIDC auth selector strings are catalog-driven.
Repository autocomplete status strings are catalog-driven.
Markdown profile settings strings are catalog-driven.
Action-rail navigation aria-label is catalog-driven.
Schema-backed settings renderer and settings view support localized labels via formatLabel.
Core command and settings titles use i18n keys for action-rail/settings coverage.
Bundled extension packages keep extension-specific locale catalogs.
